    • testSMT1

      public void testSMT1()
      Unit test coming from usage in translation to SMT solvers. Shows that predefined set types BOOL and ℤ are retained in the left-hand side of a membership predicate.

    • testSMT2

      public void testSMT2() throws Exception
      Other unit tests used for verifying assumptions about the translation of booleans.
